title: Chill Butter Bites
description: A simple recipe to make delicious chill butter bites, perfect as a snack or appetizer. These bite-sized treats are easy to make and require minimal ingredients.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix the softened Butter and chilled Chill in a bowl until well combined.
Roll the mixture into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Place the balls onto the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer the bites to a wire rack to cool completely.
